issues.description: Filter uses 'maxCost' but card text specifies '5000 power or less', not cost. Should use power-based filter, not cost-based filter.
Filter missing 'type' constraint for {Revolutionary Army}. Card text explicitly requires 'Revolutionary Army type Character card'.

Action only specifies playing from deck but omits the 'look at top 3 cards' and 'place rest at bottom in any order' deck manipulation steps. SearchDeck should include scry/reorder functionality or separate actions for deck inspection and reordering.
